_meta.description: Intra-repo source-module dependency adjacency. key depends on each listed value.
_meta.derived_from: src-<pkg>.graph.json .file_edges (file-level, one edge per importing/calling file pair)
_meta.edge_field: .file_edges[] {from, to}; direction from -> to means 'from depends on to'
_meta.filter: kept only edges where BOTH endpoints start with 'src/' (src->src). Dropped edges whose 'from' was under test/ or examples/ (tests/examples importing source); zero src->non-src edges exist, so no source-module dependency is lost. All external / node_module deps are absent from .file_edges by construction (they live in each file's external_packages field, which was not used).
_meta.path_normalization: graph paths are package-relative (e.g. 'src/foo.ts'); normalized to manifest 'src' format as 'packages/<pkg>/<path>' so keys/values join directly to manifest.json .modules[].src
